channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: They graduate to six figure salaries, and grueling work
item.description: Cadets from the nation's Merchant Marine academies are finding lots of demand and great salaries because of a shortage of licensed mariners.

item.title: What is a radical? It's the question of M.I.A.'s vexing career
item.description: Fans who danced to "Paper Planes" might hardly recognize the conspiracy-touting artist before them today — but in a certain way, she's the same button...

item.title: Moscow marks Victory Day with a Red Square parade under tight security
item.description: Security was tight in Moscow as Putin and several foreign leaders attended the parade, even as a U.S.-brokered three-day ceasefire eased concerns abou...

item.title: Southern Republicans redistrict after Supreme Court rules, Dems lose big in Virginia
item.description: The Supreme Court weakened minority voting rights and prompted Republicans in four states to move to redistrict as part of Trump's push. A court nulli...
